## beehiiv bulk-subscription-updates

Inspect bulk subscription update jobs

### Synopsis

Track bulk subscription update jobs after you submit a bulk change request.

```
beehiiv bulk-subscription-updates [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv bulk-subscription-updates list
beehiiv bulk-subscription-updates show bulk_subscription_update_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for bulk-subscription-updates
```

      --output string           Choose the output format (json, table, raw)
      --publication-id string   Override the Beehiiv publication ID
      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit

      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
